title: Pizza Hut 3 Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: Pizza Hut <3 Evangelion             Quote Post by CitizenGeek » Thu Sep 06, 2007 3:56 pm ANN reports that Pizza Hut in Japan are running a promotion with the new Evangelion movie! Check out the ANN article out here . And the official website for the promotion is here . It never stops amazing me how popular Evangelion is in Japan. An animation like Evangelion would never get such attention in the West. Apparently, there's Pizza Hut product placement in RoE 1.0 and all!

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Thu Sep 06, 2007 4:05 pm There is a lot of brand name placements in the movie. One of the other big ones is Doritos. Monkey has a link to what the bags look like on his main page HERE

[]:             Quote Post by CitizenGeek » Thu Sep 06, 2007 4:23 pm Hunter21 wrote: There is a lot of brand name placements in the movie. One of the other big ones is Doritos. Monkey has a link to what the bags look like on his main page HERE

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Thu Sep 06, 2007 5:39 pm Pizza Hut huh? Classy! I like it. :P

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Sep 06, 2007 8:54 pm Not nearly as many as UCC and Doritos, which were seen clearly enmass in Misato's dirty apartment. When Shinji opens Misato's fridge for the first time, and says "snacks?", all the shelves were filled with Doritos. Also, there was a row of beer that wasn't Yebisu (Kirin Lager). The Pizza Hut sign was seen briefly in the background, when Shinji was walking to school or something, there may have been another that I missed. P.S. UCC is not all that bad

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Thu Sep 06, 2007 8:56 pm And the cool thing about CG, is that even more product placement can be stuffed in before the DVD release! EDIT: On topic, just found this: [url]http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/news/2007-09-06/pizza-hut-launches-evangelion-movie-campaign-in-japan[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by Avatar of Dreams » Thu Sep 06, 2007 9:10 pm It amazes me that Rebuild has amassed this much popularity in brand name products in Japan. :shock: I can't even remember the last time Pizza Hut did something like this in the U.S.

[]:             Quote Post by zeaven » Thu Sep 06, 2007 9:29 pm Anime News Network wrote: one of 50 life-size Rei Ayanami cardboard stand-ups

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Thu Sep 06, 2007 9:31 pm C.C "Pizza Butt" vs. Rei "ZOMG TEH Rei!1!" Ayanami FIGHTO

[]:             Quote Post by Coded to the Core » Fri Sep 07, 2007 2:51 am It's like how they turned "Keroro Gunsou" to a Giant Gunpla advertisement , Now they're Turning Evangelion into a Doritos/Pizza hut Advertisement . And people UCC ROCKS ! .

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Sep 07, 2007 8:40 am http://xs219.xs.to/xs219/07365/eva1_s.jpg http://xs219.xs.to/xs219/07365/eva2_s.jpg http://xs219.xs.to/xs219/07365/eva3_s.jpg lol desu.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Fri Sep 07, 2007 8:52 am cool, thanks EM

[]:             Quote Post by Yasha » Fri Sep 07, 2007 8:57 am Hmmm... it's not that I like Kaworu, but even he does not deserve such depiction of himself. ^^

[]:             Quote Post by JP » Fri Sep 07, 2007 10:07 am I remember when Star Wars I opened here, Pizza Hut made these plastic/rubbery drinking cups in the shapes of certain Star Wars characters. So what's wrong about drinking from a plastic Shinji's skull? Btw seeing the Seele logo, ominous and all on a Pizza Hut page...good stuff Edit Btw: Is it just me or is Misato...."off" in that last picture? Maybe it's the pose

[]:             Quote Post by CitizenGeek » Fri Sep 07, 2007 10:08 am The Eva Monkey wrote: http://xs219.xs.to/xs219/07365/eva1_s.jpg http://xs219.xs.to/xs219/07365/eva2_s.jpg http://xs219.xs.to/xs219/07365/eva3_s.jpg lol desu.

[]:             Quote Post by Yasha » Fri Sep 07, 2007 10:11 am JP wrote: Edit Btw: Is it just me or is Misato...."off" in that last picture? Maybe it's the pose

[]: ^_^ \/,,             Quote Post by chiefen » Fri Sep 07, 2007 1:00 pm CitizenGeek wrote: The Eva Monkey wrote: http://xs219.xs.to/xs219/07365/eva1_s.jpg http://xs219.xs.to/xs219/07365/eva2_s.jpg http://xs219.xs.to/xs219/07365/eva3_s.jpg lol desu.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Sep 07, 2007 3:15 pm I hate Pizza Hut. Even I think that's pushing the Eva love too far. Plus what is Misato? THe fucking kid from the Exorcist? Does that make Pen-Pen Max Von Sydow? Oh wait, Misato is pulling a Pretzel because then the box can show ASS and TITS in glorious greasy detail.

[]:             Quote Post by CitizenGeek » Fri Sep 07, 2007 3:28 pm I think it's great that anime has reached a point where it can make money by whoring itself out to massive companies, just like live-action had been doing for quite a while now. Gendo'sPapa wrote: Plus what is Misato? THe fucking kid from the Exorcist?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Sep 07, 2007 3:31 pm desu doesn't really mean any one thing, it's simply added at the end to sentences. I think it's just used to state that something exists? Though I know that would be arimasu/imasu. Gah, can't remember. Re: Pizza Hut pics: Cool, although the characters look VERY off! Why is it they look decent in the Newtype art and not here?! (Though the trippy background is neat...) We don't get any Ebichu/Yebisu biiru?! Pedro: NOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOO!
